languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

languages.text: "Использование ксеногенного механизма есть техноересь что погубила Тиркуаз-4. Да упокоит Омниссия машинные духи погибшей станции".
"The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

"The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."
"The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

languages.text: 「異種機械の利用は、ティルクアズ4を破壊した技術的異端である。失われたステーションの機械霊に、オムニシアが平和を与えよ」
languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

traits.locale_text: 「異種機械の利用は、ティルクアズ4を破壊した技術的異端である。失われたステーションの機械霊に、オムニシアが平和を与えよ。」

languages.text: « La technohérésie qui a détruit Tirkuaz-4 résulte de l'utilisation de machines xénogénétiques. Puisse l'Omnimessie accorder la paix aux esprits de la machine qui résidaient sur la station perdue. »
languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

traits.locale_text: « La technohérésie qui a détruit Tirkuaz-4 résulte de l'utilisation de machines xénogénétiques. Puisse l'Omnimessie accorder la paix aux esprits de la machine qui résidaient sur la station perdue. »

languages.text: "Der Einsatz xenogenischer Maschinen war die Tech-Ketzerei, die Tirkuaz-4 zerstörte. Möge der Omnissiah den Maschinengeistern der verlorenen Station Frieden gewähren."
languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

traits.locale_text: "Der Einsatz xenogenischer Maschinen war die Tech-Ketzerei, die Tirkuaz-4 zerstörte. Möge der Omnissiah den Maschinengeistern der verlorenen Station Frieden gewähren."

languages.text: "Zeno kaynaklı makinelerin kullanımı, Tirkuaz-4'ü yok eden tekno kâfirliktir. Hermesih, kayıp istasyonun makine ruhlarına huzur bahşetsin."
languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno kaynaklı makinelerin kullanımı, Tirkuaz-4'ü yok eden tekno kâfirliktir. Hermesih, kayıp istasyonun makine ruhlarına huzur bahşetsin."

languages.text: «El uso de maquinaria xenogénica es la tecnoherejía que provocó la destrucción de Tirkuaz-4. Que el Omnissiah otorgue la paz eterna a los espíritus máquina de la estación perdida».
languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."

traits.locale_text: «El uso de maquinaria xenogénica es la tecnoherejía que provocó la destrucción de Tirkuaz-4. Que el Omnissiah otorgue la paz eterna a los espíritus máquina de la estación perdida».

languages.text: “异形机械的应用，正是毁灭提库阿兹4号的技术异端。愿欧姆尼赛亚庇佑那座失落星站的机魂，使其得享永恒的安宁。”
languages.original_text: "The use of xenogenic machinery is the tech-heresy that destroyed Tirkuaz-4. May the Omnissiah grant peace to the machine spirits of the lost station."
